title: [MTR3/4]762mm Trains & Fictional Trains
description: This resource pack adds 762mm Fictional Trains and coaster vehicles
body:
![fictional emu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05446ee050484f43ca2effd56af4d58bf4bd13a7_0.webp)

### Information

This resource pack adds 762mm(2 ft 6 in gauge) rail tracks and trains

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (MTR3, MTR4) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 version (NTE)

Before using, please check the Readme included inside the pack!

Compatible with [Non Standard Gauge Rail RP ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr1067mm_rail)

### Contents
* fictional EMU (762) - based on Waldenburgerbahn cfe
* fictionam DMU (762) - based on korail NDC but small scaled
* Old Taitung Line DMU
* Old Suin Line DMU
* Mine Train Coaster (RCT3 Style)
